ai_summary: Alembic Limited has issued an intimation dated July 10, 2026, setting August 4, 2026, as the record date for determining shareholders entitled to receive a dividend for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The dividend payment is contingent upon approval at the Annual General Meeting scheduled for August 11, 2026, representing a standard corporate action for profit distribution. A key red flag is that all dates mentioned, including the document's own creation date, are in the future, which is highly unusual for a financial document presented for current analysis.
